compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for recipe-executor.sh core behavior
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh with behavioral tests for recipe-executor.sh. Tests use fake adapter scripts in temp directories — real Rope is NOT required. Tests must fail (RED) before recipe-executor.sh exists.

### Setup pattern:
- Create a temporary test registry YAML in a temp dir
- Create a fake adapter script in a temp dir (prints pre-defined JSON output, accepts any args)
- Export TEST_REGISTRY_PATH and TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR environment variables
- recipe-executor.sh reads these env vars instead of hardcoded paths when set

### Tests to implement:
1. **test_engine_resolution_from_registry**: Given a registry with a recipe entry (using fake adapter), calling recipe-executor.sh with that recipe name succeeds and returns JSON with exit_code=0
2. **test_structured_json_output_format**: Output from executor is valid JSON with all required fields: files_changed (array), transforms_applied (integer), errors (array), exit_code (integer)
3. **test_missing_engine_returns_degraded_status**: When the adapter script cannot find its engine (fake adapter exits with missing-engine signal), executor returns JSON with degraded=true and engine_name field populated, exit_code=1
4. **test_unknown_recipe_returns_error**: Calling executor with an unregistered recipe name returns exit code 1 and JSON with errors field non-empty
5. **test_executor_passes_params_via_env**: Verify adapter receives RECIPE_PARAM_* env vars set by executor (fake adapter echoes env vars to output); confirm no shell interpolation of params in command string

## Files to Create
- tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh (executable)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh
- [ ] Test file has valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh
- [ ] Tests fail with clear error (RED phase — recipe-executor.sh does not yet exist)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] Test uses fake adapter scripts (no real Rope dependency)
  Verify: grep -q "fake_adapter\|mock_adapter\|FAKE_ADAPTER\|TEST_ADAPTER" tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh

comments.body: AC amendment: The fake adapter script in TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR must match the adapter filename convention: if the test registry entry has adapter='fake-adapter.sh', then TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR must contain a script named 'fake-adapter.sh'. The convention is: executor reads adapter field from registry → looks for '{TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR}/{adapter_field_value}'. This must match the executor implementation in 53d7-c1a8. Document this convention clearly in the test setup comments so 53d7-c1a8 can conform to it.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: .test-index, tests/lib/run_test.sh, tests/lib/assert.sh; exemplars read: tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh, tests/scripts/test-resolve-stack-adapter.sh) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete (RED tests confirmed failing) ✓
comments.author: Test
